creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
mva         2012-05-14 18:06:56 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    games                Makefile 
  Added files:
    games/krank          Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    games/krank/files    patch-krank 
  Log:
  A game of dexterity, being somewhere between Breakout and billiard,
  where the aim of each level is to shove floating stones towards
  compatible static stones.
  You control a short chain of stones with your mouse to achieve that.
  
  WWW: http://krank.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/167236
  Submitted by:   nemysis@gmx.ch
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1422    +1 -0      ports/games/Makefile
  1.1       +58 -0     ports/games/krank/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/games/krank/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/games/krank/files/patch-krank (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/games/krank/pkg-descr (new)
